nasb.text: Then the officials and all the people said to the priests and to the prophets, “No death sentence for this man! For he has spoken to us in the name of the Lord our God.”

esv.text: Then the officials and all the people said to the priests and the prophets, “This man does not deserve the sentence of death, for he has spoken to us in the name of the Lord our God.”

cnv.text: 於是眾領袖和眾民對祭司和先知說：“這人不應該處死，因為他奉耶和華我們　神的名對我們說話。”

ccb.text: 官员和民众便对祭司和先知说：“这人不该被处死，因为他是奉我们上帝耶和华的名对我们说话。”
